name: IGH_PreviewObject
summary: All IGH_DocumentObjects that wish to participate in Viewport redraws must implement this interface.

methods.name: DrawViewportMeshes
methods.summary: Implement this function to draw all shaded meshes. If the viewport does not support shading, this function will not be called.

methods.name: DrawViewportWires
methods.summary: Implement this function to draw all wire and point geometry previews.

properties.name: ClippingBox
properties.summary: Gets the clipping box for this object. The clipping box is typically the union of the boundingboxes of all the geometry that is drawn by this object.

properties.name: Hidden
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether or not this object is currently drawing preview flags.

properties.name: IsPreviewCapable
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether or not this object (in its current state) can draw geometric previews at all.
